title: Add async-load option to prep, proc, proc_dff and verific

features.name: async reset loading variable value
features.description: Code should include an always block with asynchronous reset where the reset action assigns a variable (not constant) to the register
features.snippet: always @ (posedge clk or negedge rstn) begin if (~rstn) cnt <= val; else cnt <= cnt + 1; end
